summary: W939 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while consolidating W938's raw sourcePretriangulated, sourceTriangulated, and triangleCompletion leaves into one existing W722 source-triangulation data provider. The route projects that provider back through W722 APIs and delegates through the W937/W936/W935/W934/W933/W932/W931/W930 route stack. Product success remains false because the W939 leaves are still explicit assumptions, and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W939 only refines W938's three raw source-triangulation leaves into one W722 source-triangulation data provider, while that provider and the rest of the W939 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W939 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W939 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions, primitive target-difference and target-codomain compactness quantifiers, primitive selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closed-map propositions, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, one W722 source-triangulation data provider, one endpoint strictShortExact witness field, bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields, and the component-level unit mapping-cone witness.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract product-success evidence, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-five W939 closed-map target-compact source-triangulation-data endpoint-strict-exact unit-strict-exact-components explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from actual endpoint strict-exact construction, unit mapping-cone component construction, target-compactness proof construction, strict-preimage/source-image coherence, localized-right-adjoint data, W722 source-category triangulation evidence, relation primitive proofs, target-surjectivity proof, mapped-cokernel primitive proof, selected-difference primitive proofs, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
